candidate_actions.name: start-security-patch-review

candidate_actions.rationale: T-001 is a high-priority (P5) security patch that is currently in READY state and needs immediate attention.

candidate_actions.name: request-pr-details
candidate_actions.description: Request detailed information or logs regarding the changes in PR #247.

candidate_actions.name: escalate-security-review
candidate_actions.description: Escalate the task to a human operator if specialized security clearance or manual verification is required.

params.issue: Security patch PR #247 requires high-level review and potential manual merge authorization.

candidate_actions.rationale: Security patches often involve critical infrastructure changes that may necessitate human oversight beyond automated capabilities.

decision.reasoning:
The start-security-patch-review is the primary goal but requires information first. request-pr-details provides high information gain and low risk, making it a critical precursor to effective execution. notify-task-commencement is secondary/administrative. escalate-security-review is a contingency if complexity exceeds agent capabilities.

Selected 'request-pr-details' (score=0.76) with confidence 0.95.

feedback.message: Started task T-001: 'Review and merge PR #247 (security patch)'. Estimated completion in 2 cycles.
new_observations: Task T-001 is now in progress.

reflection.lesson_learned: Prioritizing security patches immediately upon arrival is the correct procedure when resources are available.
reflection.reflection_summary: The agent successfully transitioned to handling a new high-priority security task without any prior workload.
